proof: function[T0](x0: T0) { fs_insert[T0](FiniteSet.empty[T0], x0) = dirac_support[T0](x0) }[T](x)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { FiniteSet.new[T0](x0.underlying_set.insert(x1)) = Option.some[FiniteSet[T0]](fs_insert[T0](x0, x1)) }[T](e, x)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { Option.some[FiniteSet[T0]](x0) != FiniteSet.new[T0](x1) or x0.underlying_set = x1 }[T](fs_insert(e, x), e.underlying_set.insert(x))
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](fs_insert(e, x), x)

function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { Option.some[FiniteSet[T0]](x0) != FiniteSet.new[T0](x1) or x0.underlying_set = x1 }[T](fs_insert(FiniteSet.empty[T], x), FiniteSet.empty[T].underlying_set.insert(x))

function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ dirac_support[T0](x0) or Real.0 = dirac_mass[T0](x0, x1) }[T](x, w0)

goal: finite_set_sum[T, Real](fs_insert(FiniteSet.empty[T], x), f) = f(x) + finite_set_sum[T, Real](FiniteSet.empty[T], f)

proof: function[T0](x0: T0) { fs_insert[T0](FiniteSet.empty[T0], x0) = dirac_support[T0](x0) }[T](x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(Real.0, Real.1)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[Real](Real.1)
let w0: T satisfy { not Real.0 <= dirac_mass(x, w0) }
function(x0: T) { Real.0 <= dirac_mass(x, x0) }(w0)
let w0: T satisfy { not w0 ∈ dirac_support(x) and dirac_mass(x, w0) != Real.0 }
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ dirac_support[T0](x0) or Real.0 = dirac_mass[T0](x0, x1) }[T](x, w0)

goal: is_pmf[T](dirac_support(x), dirac_mass(x)) = (cond_nonneg and cond_zero and cond_sum)
proof: function[T0](x0: T0 -> Real, x1: FiniteSet[T0]) { (forall(x2: T0) { Real.0 <= x0(x2) } and forall(x3: T0) { x3 ∈ x1 or x0(x3) = Real.0 } and finite_set_sum[T0, Real](x1, x0) = Real.1) = is_pmf[T0](x1, x0) }[T](dirac_mass(x), dirac_support(x))

function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0 -> Real) { not DiscretePMF.constraint[T0](x0, x1) or exists(k0: DiscretePMF[T0]) { Option.some[DiscretePMF[T0]](k0) = DiscretePMF.new[T0](x0, x1) } }[T](dirac_support(x), dirac_mass(x))
function[T0](x0: T0) { DiscretePMF.new[T0](dirac_support[T0](x0), dirac_mass[T0](x0)) = Option.some[DiscretePMF[T0]](dirac_pmf[T0](x0)) }[T](x)

function[T0](x0: DiscretePMF[T0], x1: FiniteSet[T0], x2: T0 -> Real) { Option.some[DiscretePMF[T0]](x0) != DiscretePMF.new[T0](x1, x2) or x0.support = x1 }[T](dirac_pmf(x), dirac_support(x), dirac_mass(x))

function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid](x0: T0) { T0.1 * x0 = x0 }[Real](rv(x))
